name: Mace of Disruption
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a Fiend or Undead with this weapon, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be destroyed.

name: Mace of Smiting
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, you can expend 1 charge to deal extra 3d6 Force damage.

name: Mace of Terror
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be Frightened of you until the end of your next turn.
properties: Frightened until end of next turn

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
description: While wearing this cloak, you have Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
properties: Advantage on saving throws vs spells and magical effects

name: Manual of Bodily Health
description: This manual contains instructions for improving the body. A creature that studies the manual for 48 hours gains 2 points in Constitution, to a maximum of 24. The manual is consumed in the process.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
description: This manual contains instructions for improving the body. A creature that studies the manual for 48 hours gains 2 points in Strength, to a maximum of 24. The manual is consumed in the process.

name: Manual of Golems
description: This manual contains instructions for creating a specific type of Golem. A creature that studies the manual for 8 hours can create that type of Golem. The manual is destroyed in the process.
properties: Instructions for creating specific Golem type

name: Manual of Quickness of Action
description: This manual contains instructions for improving the body. A creature that studies the manual for 48 hours gains 2 points in Dexterity, to a maximum of 24. The manual is consumed in the process.

name: Marvelous Pigments
description: This pot contains enough paint to cover 5 square feet. The paint can be used to create magical images that appear real. The images last until the paint dries or for 1 hour.
properties: Images last 1 hour or until paint dries

name: Medallion of Thoughts
description: This medallion allows you to communicate telepathically with creatures within 60 feet of you. You can also cast Zone of Silence with it once per day.
properties: Cast Zone of Silence once per day

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
description: This mirror has a silver frame and a silvered glass surface. When a creature looks into the mirror, it must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be trapped in the mirror. Trapped creatures can be freed by casting Remove Curse.
properties: DC 17 Wisdom save or trapped in mirror
Trapped creatures can be freed with Remove Curse

name: Moonblade
description: An Artifact. This elf blade is a powerful magic weapon. You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The sword is sentient and has an intelligence of 16.

name: Mithral Armor
description: This armor is made of mithral, a lightweight and strong metal. You have a +1 bonus to Armor Class while wearing this armor. Your Speed isn't reduced by wearing Heavy Armor.
properties: Speed not reduced by Heavy Armor

name: Necklace of Adaptation
description: While wearing this necklace, you have Resistance to one damage type chosen when the necklace is created. The damage type can be changed as a Magic action.
properties: Can change damage type as Magic action

name: Necklace of Fireballs
description: This necklace has 5 beads. Each bead functions as a Bead of Force when thrown. The necklace regains 1d3 expended beads daily at dawn.
properties: Each bead functions as Bead of Force

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
description: This necklace has 7 beads. Each bead can be used to cast a spell. The beads regain their powers at dawn. Various spell combinations are available.

name: Nine Lives Stealer
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, you steal one of its lives. The creature must succeed on a DC 17 Charisma saving throw or be Charmed by you.

name: Nolzur's Marvelous Pigments
description: These pigments can be used to create nonmagical copies of any object. The copies last for 1 hour before fading away.

name: Oathbow
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this magic weapon. When you make a ranged attack with this weapon, you can choose to make a special attack. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or take an extra 3d8 damage.
properties: DC 17 Wisdom save or extra damage

name: Oil of Etherealness
description: This viscous, green fluid has the consistency of olive oil. A creature that applies this oil to its skin or weapon becomes Ethereal for 1 hour.
properties: Can be applied to skin or weapon

name: Oil of Sharpness
description: This oil is used to coat a nonmagical weapon. The weapon becomes a +1 weapon for 1 hour. If the weapon is already magical, it becomes a +2 weapon.

name: Orb of Dragonkind
description: This crystal orb can be used to communicate with dragons. While holding it, you can cast Speak with Monsters on a Dragon. The orb has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Pearl of Power
description: This pearl has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to regain one expended spell slot. The spell slot can be no higher than 5th level. The pearl regains all expended charges daily at dawn.
properties: Regain one expended spell slot (max 5th level)
